title: Fix `case inside` internal error `V3Number toUInt with 4-state`

features.name: enum type with wildcard bit pattern in value
features.description: Code should include an enum type definition with a value containing wildcard pattern using ? (3-state wildcard)

features.name: case inside with wildcard enum pattern
features.description: Code should include a case inside statement that uses enum values with wildcard bit patterns as case items
